code: export class CorporationMembersParser{constructor(){this._members=[];}flush(){this._members=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const total=wrapper.readInt();const members=new Array(total);for(let i=0;i<total;i++){members[i]={userId:wrapper.readInt(),username:wrapper.readString(),figure:wrapper.readString(),rankId:wrapper.readInt(),rankName:wrapper.readString(),rankOrder:wrapper.readInt(),pay:wrapper.readInt(),weeklyShifts:wrapper.readInt(),totalShifts:wrapper.readInt(),lastSeenMins:wrapper.readInt()};}this._members=members;return true;}get members(){return this._members;}}
